# Minecraft Portfolio

> Arshad A's developer portfolio, built as a walkable 3D Minecraft-style voxel house. Visitors scroll to move a camera along a fixed path through a garden and each room of the house.

Arshad is a Software Engineer (full-stack, Next.js/NestJS) and freelance security researcher, listed in CERT-In's (Government of India) Hall of Fame for responsibly disclosing a critical vulnerability affecting 200,000+ users.

## Site structure

The site is a single scrolling page (no separate URLs per section). Rooms, in scroll order:

- Garden — entry, name sign
- Front Door — about-me intro
- About Me — bio, background
- Hall of Fame — CERT-In recognition, press coverage
- Experience — work history (ELT Global, Brototype)
- Projects — Triple i Admin Portal, Triple i Learning Platform, SSH Portfolio, and other side projects
- Skills — tech stack (Next.js, NestJS, TanStack, Zustand, Zod, TypeScript, etc.)
- Contact — contact form, social links, live GitHub contribution graph

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/arshadakl
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/arshad-akl
- Blog: https://blog.arshadakl.in
- SSH portfolio (terminal UI): ssh arshadakl.in

## Notes for crawlers

This is a JavaScript-rendered 3D scene (React Three Fiber) — content is not visible in the raw HTML without executing JavaScript. A non-3D fallback is available via the "Simple view" toggle in the UI.
